scripts.build: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:api
scripts.build:web: node scripts/sync-live-agent-doc.mjs && pnpm --dir apps/web run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:packages && pnpm run typecheck:web && pnpm run typecheck:api
scripts.typecheck:packages: pnpm --dir packages/email-templates run typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/mullet-schema run typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/mullet-sim run typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/sync-schema run typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/sync-client run typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/sync-worker run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:web && pnpm run test:api
scripts.test:packages: pnpm --dir packages/email-templates run test && pnpm --dir packages/mullet-schema run test && pnpm --dir packages/mullet-sim run test && pnpm --dir packages/sync-schema run test && pnpm --dir packages/sync-client run test && pnpm --dir packages/sync-worker run test
scripts.check:deploy: pnpm run check:conflict-markers && pnpm run check:no-github-actions && pnpm run test:cloudrun-env-origins && pnpm run check:effect-topology && pnpm run check:agent-doc-links && pnpm run check:architecture && pnpm run check:contract-drift && pnpm run check:public-projection-freshness && pnpm --dir ../../packages/agent-readiness run test && pnpm --dir ../../packages/agent-readiness run typecheck && pnpm --dir ../../packages/autopilot-control-protocol run typecheck && pnpm --dir ../../apps/pylon run typecheck && pnpm run
